title: Clean up ARCHITECTURE.md — remove stale content + update directory tree
description: ARCHITECTURE.md has issues: (1) Lines 191-252 contain stale CR instructions from prior milestones — remove them, (2) Directory tree only lists ~14 src/ files but 20+ exist (missing: embed.js, vad.js, profiler.js, latency-log.js, store/index.js, adapters/*, cli/*, tunnel.js, cert.js, httpsServer.js, middleware.js), (3) Install section shows port 3000 — change to 1234. Assign to architect.
